overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic downtown district during golden hour. The player moves along sidewalks, passes through a neon-lit covered walkway, and emerges into a busy intersection surrounded by skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with corporate buildings

events.description: pedestrian in green jacket passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a tall building with circular blue neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete building facade with vertical circular cyan neon lights
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning between buildings in the distance
large digital billboard displaying purple holographic face advertisement
tall palm tree visible between buildings against the sky
modern street lamp post along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk during golden hour, passing a concrete building with distinctive circular blue neon lights. A pedestrian in a green jacket walks past on the right. The street is relatively quiet with sparse traffic and a few distant pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with bright yellow neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway under building overhang
transition from natural daylight to artificial neon lighting from yellow signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered arcade area with bright yellow neon real estate signs

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of covered walkway with recessed lighting fixtures
bright yellow neon sign reading GENNADY EFIMOV REALTY with arrow
large digital screens displaying sunset landscape imagery behind glass
massive square concrete pillar supporting the building above
large potted tree in white square container

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, the scene shifts to artificial neon lighting dominated by bright yellow real estate signs. The area features large digital advertising screens, concrete support pillars, and potted plants. The sky is no longer visible as the camera moves through this sheltered commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection plaza
returning to mixed natural and artificial lighting with golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection surrounded by pedestrians and towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk and beginning to cross

entered.detail: modern glass and steel skyscraper towering above the intersection
vertical traffic signal showing green light for pedestrians
yellow painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
white and black modernist building with vertical strip windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide urban intersection bathed in golden hour light. The camera crosses the street alongside a moderate crowd of pedestrians, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and large digital billboards. Traffic lights and crosswalk markings are visible as the scene opens up to the expansive downtown plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a quiet city sidewalk through a sheltered commercial corridor and out into a bustling downtown intersection. It begins by walking past a concrete building accented with circular blue neon lights under the warm glow of golden hour, as a pedestrian in a green jacket passes by. As the camera moves forward, the open sky vanishes and the lighting shifts to artificial neon yellows while entering a covered walkway filled with digital advertising screens and concrete pillars. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the overhang, returning to the golden sunlight of a wide urban plaza. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards while crossing the street alongside a crowd of pedestrians.
